title: tocoyena neglecta
intro: Tocoyena neglecta, also known as the Forest Gold or Yellow Trumpetflower, is a flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family native to South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is often used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tocoyena neglecta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Tocoyena neglecta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
